raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-directed declarative affirmation committing to a shift in attentional and evaluative stance toward effort, justification, and receptivity",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "ease, rest, clarity, and flow are currently experienced as requiring prior justification or earning",
    "effort is frequently generated by automatic habit rather than situational necessity",
    "simplicity is already present in some situations and can be recognized without alteration",
    "resistance to life events is an optional stance that can be relinquished",
    "these attitudinal changes are achievable through repeated self-statement"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; each clause reinforces a single theme of reducing self-imposed preconditions on positive states without logical contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker exhibits a pattern of excessive striving or guilt around rest, the statements are practiced in conjunction with values-based action, and external demands remain within manageable limits",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statements are used to rationalize avoidance of necessary effort, reality-testing is suspended, or structural barriers requiring active engagement are reframed solely as internal resistance"
}
